title: WalletProfile
description: Wallet compatibility record for a credential format × protocol × compliance combination. The canonical wallet profile set is auto-derived from CredentialTemplate configuration via the derivation key (credential_format, issuance_protocol, compliance_profile_code). Organizations MAY store override entries at /v1/wallet-registry to extend or customise the derived profile for their specific deployment. GET /v1/wallet-registry returns merged results: derived profiles supplemented (or overridden) by stored entries.

id.description: Unique identifier. Present on stored override entries; absent on derived profiles returned inline.

organization_id.description: Organization that owns this override entry. Null on system-derived profiles.

is_override.description: True when this record is a stored organisation override rather than a system-derived profile. Stored overrides require id and organization_id.

override_precedence.description: Merge priority for stored overrides relative to the derived profile. Higher values take precedence. Default 50. System-derived entries have effective precedence 0.

wallet_apps.description: Compatible wallet application names. In merged results, override entries append to (or replace) the derived list depending on merge_strategy.

merge_strategy.description: How the wallet_apps and specifications arrays from this override are merged with the derived profile. APPEND adds entries; REPLACE substitutes the entire array.
